debug_info.goal:
case cons
x : ℕ
xs : List ℕ
ih : (parts₁ xs).length = 2 ^ (xs.length - 1)
⊢ (parts₁ (x :: xs)).length = 2 ^ ((x :: xs).length - 1)

failed_attempts:
have parts₁_cons : parts₁ (x :: xs) = concatMap (extendl x) (parts₁ xs) := by
     unfold parts₁; simp [List.foldr, Function.comp]
   rw [parts₁_cons]
   cases xs with
   | nil =>
     simp [parts₁, concatMap, Chapter1.concat₁, extendl, cons]
   | cons y ys =>
     have hall : ∀ p ∈ parts₁ (y :: ys), p ≠ [] := by
       intro p hp
       have : parts₁ (y :: ys) = concatMap (extendl y) (parts₁ ys) := by
         unfold parts₁; simp [List.foldr, Function.comp]
       rw [this] at hp
       simp [concatMap, Chapter1.concat₁] at hp
       obtain ⟨q, _, hq⟩ := hp
       cases q with
       | nil => simp [extendl, cons] at hq; rcases hq with rfl; simp
       | cons s qs => simp [extendl, cons, glue] at hq; rcases hq with rfl | rfl <;> simp
     have hlen : (concatMap (extendl x) (parts₁ (y :: ys))).length = 2 * (parts₁ (y :: ys)).length := by
       induction (parts₁ (y :: ys)) with
       | nil => simp [concatMap, Chapter1.concat₁]
       | cons p ps ihps =>
         simp [concatMap, Chapter1.concat₁] at *
         have hp_ne : p ≠ [] := hall p (List.mem_cons_self p ps)
         have hp_len : (extendl x p).length = 2 := by
           cases p with | nil => contradiction | cons s ps' => simp [extendl]
         have := ihps (fun q hq => hall q (List.mem_cons_of_mem p hq))
         omega
     rw [hlen, ih]
     simp [List.length]
     ring
